name: User-authored transitions on gating decisions
description: User reviews DEC-0001/0002/0003 in light of the design-review findings and advances each to enacted or requests revision. All open-to-enacted transitions require user authority per the lifecycle metadata. Until each gating decision is enacted, FEAT-001 cannot advance from proposed to approved.
exit_criteria: DEC-0001 in enacted state with enacted_by=user
DEC-0002 in enacted state with enacted_by=user
DEC-0003 in enacted state with enacted_by=user
